body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/findMultilevelSourcePage 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/findMultilevelSourcePage 
 ## 接口描述 
费控 单据配置 --> 自定义字段 --> 层级选择 --> 对应选项数据源 ：分页查询企业配置数据源信息  
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"ids","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%EF%BC%88%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AAID%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90128%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"%5B%22SOUR01%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90id%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%871000%E4%B8%AA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","maxLength":"128","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0-%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"start","label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"limit","label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"100"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%20%E4%B8%BB%E9%94%AE","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID","exampleValue":"SOUR01","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"comId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"3117","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"totalCount","required":false,"label":"%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E8%AE%B0","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%E7%9A%84%E5%BC%82%E5%B8%B8%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/findMultilevelSourcePage?start=0&limit=100
```json
{
	"ids": ["SOUR01"],
	"selectSourceName": "数据源"
}
```
###返回示例
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！",
    "totalCount": 1,
    "list": [
        {
            "seqId": 150,
            "id": "SOUR01",
            "comId": 3648,
            "selectSourceName": "数据源1号"
        }
    ]
}
```    
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/findMultilevelSourcePage

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/findMultilevelSourcePage

接口描述

费控 单据配置 --> 自定义字段 --> 层级选择 --> 对应选项数据源 ：分页查询企业配置数据源信息

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"ids","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%EF%BC%88%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AAID%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90128%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"%5B%22SOUR01%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90id%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%871000%E4%B8%AA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","maxLength":"128","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0-%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"start","label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"limit","label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"100"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%20%E4%B8%BB%E9%94%AE","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID","exampleValue":"SOUR01","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"comId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"3117","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"totalCount","required":false,"label":"%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E8%AE%B0","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9A%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81%0A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%E7%9A%84%E5%BC%82%E5%B8%B8%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/findMultilevelSourcePage?start=0&limit=100

{
	"ids": ["SOUR01"],
	"selectSourceName": "数据源"
}

###返回示例

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！",
    "totalCount": 1,
    "list": [
        {
            "seqId": 150,
            "id": "SOUR01",
            "comId": 3648,
            "selectSourceName": "数据源1号"
        }
    ]
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
400 请联系管理员配置企业信息 无
ERR0000 解密失败 无
